name: Coconut Pecan Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 200°F (93°C).
2. Divide the popped popcorn between two ungreased rectangular pans.
3. In a large bowl, mix the frosting mix (dry), margarine, corn syrup, water, and salt until well combined.
4. Heat the mixture over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until bubbles form around the edges.
5. Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from heat and stir in baking soda until foamy.
7. Pour the mixture evenly over the popcorn in each pan.
8. Stir to ensure the popcorn is well coated.
9. Transfer the pans to the oven and bake for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
10. Allow the popcorn to cool completely before storing it in an airtight container.
Makes 16 cups. You can reduce the amount of popcorn by 2 cups and add 2 cups of pecan pieces. Add 1 cup of pecans to each pan after dividing the popcorn. Mix well.
